name: Quick, Southern Style Red Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bacon into 1-inch pieces.
2. Cut the onions into half-inch wedges.
3. Mince the garlic clove.
4. Dice the bell pepper.
5. Drain the kidney beans.
6. Cook the bacon in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until browned but not crisp, about 5 minutes. Remove the bacon from the skillet and drain off all but two tablespoons of drippings.
7. Add the onions to the skillet; cook until the onions are tender but not brown, about 5 minutes.
8. Add enough water to the broth to make 2-1/2 cups total liquid.
9. Add the beef broth, bacon drippings, onion, garlic, thyme, and salt to the skillet.
10. Bring the mixture to a boil.
11. Stir in the rice and cover tightly.
12. Simmer for 15 minutes.
13. Stir in the bell pepper; continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes until all liquid is absorbed.
14. Remove from heat. Stir in the kidney beans. Cover and let stand covered for about 5 more minutes before serving.
